title: Sensor Modeling & Simulation
description: High-fidelity EO/IR/RF sensor simulation from OKTAL-SE for Hardware-In-the-Loop, Man-In-the-Loop, and training environments across defense and aerospace programs.

products.name: SE-Workbench-EO
features: SE-Workbench-EO has been designed for the creation of synthetic models of complex environments that have to be as realistic as possible in order to stimulate systems using sensors in the EO domain

products.name: SE-Workbench-HWIL-EO
features: SE-FAST-HWIL is the real time image generator package designed to deliver high realistic infrared (IR) images at very high frame rates (200Hz and above) in a closed loop mode

products.name: SE-Workbench-EOS
features: Target signature rendering in Electro-Optics domain
Tools and data included in SE-WORKBENCH-EOS dedicated to aircraft signature computation in the EO domain

products.name: SE-FAST-IG
features: SE-FAST-IG is a high performance visualisation application
Driven by users' simulators through its CIGI interface, supports features for flight training, driving simulations, ground warfare

products.name: SE-Workbench-RF
features: The aim of SE-Workbench-RF is to create synthetic models of complex environments for simulating systems with EM sources and sensors, typically radar systems

products.name: SE-Workbench-SAR
features: SE-Workbench-SAR allows computing SAR data with advanced OKTAL-SE software
SAR raw data computed using ray-tracing combined with asymptotic methods (GO, PO and ECM)

products.name: SE-Workbench-RBGM
features: SE-RAY-RADAR is dedicated to RBGM computing (Real Beam Ground Mapping) of complex 3D scenes
Simulates radar frequency, scanning parameters, trajectory embedding, visualization modes

products.name: SE-Workbench-AEO
features: SE-RAY-AEO: Pulsed LASER context, specular predominant cover
Simulation of range gating capacities and detection/identification of metallic or dielectric targets

products.name: SE-Workbench-GNSS
features: SE-NAV is a propagation simulator for assessment of signals reception in stringent environments
Predicts performance of GPS, GALILEO, BEIDOU or pseudolites in 3D virtual scenes

products.name: SE-TK FORM Suite
features: SE-Workbench Special Tool-Kits (TK) for expert users
APIs for refined preparation of scenarios and dynamic modification during rendering

products.name: SE-TK D SCNX Suite
features: Enhanced SE-TOOLKIT functions for dynamic scenario changes in closed loop mode
Real-time API-driven modification of 3D scene content during simulation

products.name: CIGI Interface
features: Common Image Generator Interface (CIGI) protocol support
Standard interface for connecting host simulators to image generators
